message:
🐛 Fix duplicate NightlyE2EStatus exports from PR #934 squash merge (#966)

Remove duplicate declarations of NightlyE2EStatus in cardRegistry.ts
and llmd/index.ts that were introduced when PR #934 was squash-merged
on top of existing nightly card registrations on main.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -12,9 +12,6 @@ export { LLMdBenchmarks } from './LLMdBenchmarks'
 export { LLMdAIInsights } from './LLMdAIInsights'
 export { LLMdConfigurator } from './LLMdConfigurator'
 
-// Nightly E2E status card
-export { NightlyE2EStatus } from './NightlyE2EStatus'
-
 // Benchmark dashboard cards
 export { NightlyE2EStatus } from './NightlyE2EStatus'
 export { BenchmarkHero } from './BenchmarkHero'
